headline: Assessing Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Valuation As Recent Share Price Weakness Meets Strong Long Term Returns
summary: Why Intuitive Surgical stock is drawing attention now Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is back in focus after a choppy stretch for the stock, prompting investors to reassess how its current share price lines up with recent returns and the scale of its surgical robotics business. See our latest analysis for Intuitive Surgical. At a share price of US$457.78, Intuitive Surgical has seen a 1-day share price return close to flat, a 7-day share price return of a 2.8% decline, and a year-to-date share...
